channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Trump says he wants to negotiate about Ukraine. It's not clear if Putin really does
item.description: Nearly three years after President Vladimir Putin invaded Ukraine, his troops are making steady progress on the battlefield. Kyiv is grappling with shortages of men and weapons. And the new U.S. president could soon halt Ukraine's massive supply of military aid.
item.dc:creator: EMMA BURROWS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Federal judge blocks Elon Musk's DOGE from accessing sensitive US Treasury Department material
item.description: A federal judge early Saturday blocked Elon Musk’s Department of Government Efficiency from accessing Treasury Department records that contain sensitive personal data such as Social Security and bank account numbers for millions of Americans. U.S. District Judge Paul A.
item.dc:creator: ANTHONY IZAGUIRRE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Crews rush to recover commuter plane found crashed on Alaska sea ice before expected snow and wind
item.description: JUNEAU, Alaska (AP) — Just hours after finding 10 people dead in western Alaska from one of the deadliest plane crashes in the state in 25 years, authorities raced to recover their remains and the wreckage of the small commuter plane from unstable sea ice before expected high winds and snow.
item.dc:creator: BECKY BOHRER and HALLIE GOLDEN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Judge blocks Trump from placing thousands of USAID workers on leave and giving them 30-day deadline
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A federal judge on Friday dealt President Donald Trump and billionaire ally Elon Musk their first big setback in their dismantling of the U.S. Agency for International Development, ordering a temporary halt to plans to pull thousands of agency staffers off the job. U.S.
item.dc:creator: ELLEN KNICKMEYER and MICHAEL KUNZELMAN, Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Trump is signing up local law officers to help with immigration enforcement
item.description: For years, the Hamilton County Sheriff's Office in suburban Indianapolis has wanted to partner with federal immigration authorities to identify and detain immigrants who are in the U.S. illegally and facing charges.
item.dc:creator: DAVID A. LIEB, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: A 15-year-old went to a Brooklyn parade. The NYPD wrongly accused him of a mass shooting
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Camden Lee was leaving high school football practice in September when he saw the photograph, splashed across the New York Police Department’s social media accounts, that would soon upend his life.
item.dc:creator: JAKE OFFENHARTZ, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Passport applications got more complicated for transgender Americans under new Trump policy
item.description: The day after President Donald Trump returned to office, Lisa Suhay took her 21-year-old daughter, Mellow, to a passport office in Norfolk, Virginia, where they live. Getting a passport for Mellow, who is transgender, was urgent.
item.dc:creator: GEOFF MULVIHILL and JOHN HANNA, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trump's DEI order leaves academic researchers fearful of political influence over grants
item.description: BERKELEY, Calif. (AP) — President Donald Trump’s crackdown on diversity, equity and inclusion initiatives in programs receiving federal money has thrown into doubt the future of research Kendra Dahmer has been doing on intestinal parasites in India and Benin.
item.dc:creator: OLGA R. RODRIGUEZ, TERRY CHEA and MAKIYA SEMINERA, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Bryan Kohberger case: Expert explains how a firing squad works
item.description: "It's very rapid. You're completely unconscious very quickly," said firing squad expert Dr. James Williams.
item.dc:creator: Liz Jassin, NewsNation

item.title: A hidden gem of whitewater rafting faces an uncertain future after Hurricane Helene
item.description: Whitewater outfitters on the Nolichucky River are facing an uncertain future after Hurricane Helene devastated this scenic spot on the North Carolina-Tennessee border.
item.dc:creator: Travis Loller, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: House Divided: Wife an Eagles fan, husband cheers for Chiefs in NOLA
item.description: When one of the couple grows up in Kansas a Chiefs fan, and the other in South Jersey an Eagles fan, one would expect the marriage to be tested but Jaime and Dave Dailey make it fun.
item.dc:creator: Brian Dulle, Fox 5

item.title: Missing commuter plane found crashed on Alaska sea ice and all 10 aboard are dead, authorities say
item.description: JUNEAU, Alaska (AP) — A small commuter plane that crashed in western Alaska on its way to the hub community of Nome was located Friday on sea ice, and all 10 people on board were dead, authorities said. The crash was one of the deadliest in the state in the last 25 years.
item.dc:creator: BECKY BOHRER and HALLIE GOLDEN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: The Trump administration is throwing more Pentagon reporters out of their workspaces
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The Trump administration on Friday doubled the number of news organizations it is evicting from their workspaces at the Pentagon in order to rotate in more friendly outlets.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BAUDER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Federal prisons being used to detain people arrested in Trump’s immigration crackdown
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — President Donald Trump’s administration is using federal prisons to detain some people arrested in its immigration crackdown, the federal Bureau of Prisons said Friday, returning to a strategy that drew allegations of mistreatment during his first term.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL R. SISAK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump signs order to establish White House Faith Office
item.description: Trump directed the office to identify ways to reduce burdens on the free exercise of religion and direct all federal agencies to designate a “faith liaison” within 90 days.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, Fox 5

item.title: Billabong, Quiksilver, Volcom to close all US locations
item.description: Liberated Brands, based in Costa Mesa, California, was the operator and licensee of Billabong, Quiksilver and Volcom in the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Lily Dallow, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Trump is trying to halt the EV charger buildout. Experts say it's not that easy
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — Experts are questioning President Donald Trump’s latest effort to slow the electric vehicle charging buildout in the U.S.
item.dc:creator: ALEXA ST. JOHN and ISABELLA O'MALLEY, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Priest attacked during service in Washington Catholic church, says Holy Spirit helped him respond
item.description: A priest is asking for prayers for a man who assaulted him earlier this week during a Washington church service.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: A mother and daughter were killed in tornadoes that struck eastern Tennessee
item.description: WARTBURG, Tenn. (AP) — Two tornadoes moved through eastern Tennessee, leaving a mother and daughter dead and injuring three other people, officials said Friday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Members of Congress denied access to Department of Education
item.description: Multiple members of Congress were denied entry to the Department of Education on Friday, according to videos and social media posts from lawmakers.
item.dc:creator: Lexi Lonas Cochran, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: DOGE staffer who accessed Treasury Department payment systems resigns after racist posts exposed
item.description: “Normalize Indian hate,” the account associated with Marko Elez posted in September, regarding people of Indian ethnicity who work in the U.S. tech sector, the Wall Street Journal reported.
item.dc:creator: Tobias Burns, Fox 5

item.title: Trump gets big boost in push to remove criminal illegal immigrants and more top headlines
item.description: Get all the stories you need-to-know from the most powerful name in news delivered first thing every morning to your inbox.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Question on Jeffrey Epstein ties prompts reported foul-mouthed response from new UK ambassador to US
item.description: Newly minted U.K. Ambassador to Washington Peter Mandelson had a terse response to a reporter's question about his prior ties to trafficker Jeffrey Epstein.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 500,000 LG electric ovens recalled after fires, pet deaths
item.description: There are 86 reports of unintentional activation of the front knobs, 28 fires, at least eight injuries, and three pet deaths, per the Consumer Product Safety Commission.
item.dc:creator: Brady Doran, KTLA 5

item.title: Missing commuter plane found crashed on Alaska sea ice and all 10 aboard are dead, authorities say
item.description: Authorities say a small commuter plane that crashed in western Alaska on its way to the hub community of Nome has been located on sea ice and all 10 on board are dead.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Newsom wants to speed up a delayed rule to make California homes more fire resistant
item.description: SACRAMENTO, Calif. (AP) — As Los Angeles reels from deadly January wildfires that destroyed thousands of homes, California Gov.
item.dc:creator: TRÂN NGUYỄN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: New Mexico courtroom devolves into brawl as 3 people rush defendant in homicide case
item.description: ALBUQUERQUE, N.M. (AP) — A hearing in a New Mexico courtroom devolved into chaos when three people rushed the defendant in a homicide case, setting off a brawl with flying fists and kicks. Courtroom video cameras recorded the Jan.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Bond set at $20M for man accused in shooting at Ohio warehouse that killed 2 and wounded 4
item.description: NEW ALBANY, Ohio (AP) — A warehouse worker said in a frantic 911 call that he was shot in the neck and then took the gun from a co-worker after he had shot several others. Two people died and four were injured in the Ohio shooting that sent panicked employees fleeing.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Senate confirms Project 2025 architect Russell Vought to lead powerful White House budget office
item.description: The Senate confirmed Russell Vought as White House budget director on Thursday night, putting an official who has planned the zealous expansion of President Donald Trump's power into one of the most influential positions in the federal government.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN GROVES, Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: 12 states to sue over DOGE access to payment systems containing personal data
item.description: “As the richest man in the world, Elon Musk is not used to being told ‘no,’ but in our country, no one is above the law," a statement from the Democratic attorneys general reads.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Ohtani's former interpreter receives nearly 5-year sentence for stealing from star athlete
item.description: Ippei Mizuhara, who became a national figure for his on-field service and off-field friendship to Los Angeles Dodgers superstar Shohei Ohtani, has been sentenced to 57 months in prison for stealing millions from the Japanese phenom.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: NCAA changes transgender policy to limit women's competition to athletes assigned female at birth
item.description: The NCAA changed its participation policy for transgender athletes on Thursday, limiting competition in women's sports to athletes assigned female at birth only.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: New NASA imagery shows large asteroid that could impact Earth in 2032
item.description: A recently released animation shows a new look at a large asteroid that has a small, but significant, chance of impacting planet Earth in seven years.
item.dc:creator: Lily Dallow, Fox 5
